description: Firmware manifest for 45Drives hardware. Used by 45d-firmware-check to compare installed firmware against latest validated versions.

hba.release_notes: Latest validated SAS3616 firmware for 9400-16i HBA

nic.release_notes: mlxup checks NVIDIA servers directly for latest firmware. No manual version tracking needed.
mlxup checks NVIDIA servers directly for latest firmware. No manual version tracking needed.
Broadcom BCM57416 onboard NIC. Flashed via niccli.
Broadcom BCM57412 P210p add-in NIC. Flashed via niccli.

bios.release_notes: BIOS updates require manual flash via BIOS recovery or vendor utility. Download from Gigabyte support site.
BIOS updates require manual flash. Download from motherboard vendor support site.

bmc.release_notes: BMC updates typically performed via IPMI web interface or vendor-specific tool.

expander.release_notes: SAS Expander firmware updates require specialized tools and careful sequencing. Contact 45Drives support.
